title: packera paupercula
intro: Packera paupercula, also known as the rusties or eastern rattlesnake plantain, is a perennial plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Packera paupercula include its ability to treat wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing the leaves in hot water or oil to create teas, tinctures, or salves that can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
